transcript.text:
So you can eat a lot of burgers?
Burger 2?
Burger 3?
Burger 4?
Burger 6?
20 burgers?
(The gentle guys are in shock...)
(So this is Korea, the capital of mukbangs...?)
(It's finally here in Korea)
('Five Guys')
(The traditional American burgers)
(arrived in Gangnam to take over Korea)
(Let's try some) It's all out now
(With their extreme flavors, they threaten to become the national burger)
(Amazing)
(We're off to try some really crazy burgers)

(Gangnam, one of the most popular places in Korea)
Hello, everyone
For today,
can you guess where I am?
(It's finally here in Korea)
('Five Guys')
(Too shy to film in the middle of Gangnam...) I'm really embarrassed, so I'll go in
(Let's go) Hello!
So here...
I came to 'Five Guys'
This place started business in 1986 in Virginia
(‘Five Guys’ is a popular American burger chain) Everyone knows about this place in the US
It's a famous hamburger place all over the world
I came here because it first opened in Korea
(Shot on June 22, 'Five Guys' already became popular in Gangnam) This place opens on June 26th,
and I was invited in advance

to taste their burgers
(I only tried the fries when I went to the US...) I've been to ‘Five Guys’ in the US
The French fries were famous, so I only ate that
I really regretted
not trying their burgers back then
I can finally try it today
(Gangnam store with the same American vibes)
I'm going to place an order now
Here, you can
customize your own burgers!
The burgers come out with the patties and buns
The rest can be ordered as toppings
You can also make your own shake!
Welcome!
You can select the toppings of your choice!
(Add as many toppings as you like...)

(A bunch)
The shake will come out first!
While you're eating, at the end over here,
we'll call you for the food
(The shake you ordered is here!)
Wow, this is the shake
This is the Oreo shake
This is a strawberry and chocolate blend shake
Wow, this is really delicious...!
The strawberries and chocolate blend
was recommended by the store
Let's try the Oreo shake too!
It's really tasty!
(While I’m quenching my thirst with a tasty shake)
(The open kitchen moves hectically)
(The staff is full of passion and energy)

(The burgers arrived)
(Full of burgers)
(Enormous package much bigger than Tzuyang's face...)
Number 1
Number 2
(She can eat all that...?)
(Foil packaging just like the ones back in the States)
It's all out now
(English warning)
I've heard a lot about you!
I heard that you can eat a lot of burgers
(Murmur)
20 burgers?!
(Seriously?)
(Can't believe you)
I'm curious to see...

How are you going to do that...?
Let's go
Good luck!
(I'll take one bite lol)
(Is this the American style...?)
(The long and difficult path of English...) I really need to learn English quickly...
Bon appétit!
‘Five Guys’ is actually
famous for their French fries
That's why back then
(Really tasty French fries...) I didn't eat the burger and only had their fries
In the case of Korean potatoes,
(Boseong potatoes as good as the ones in the States) they say they used Boseong potatoes
to make the fries as similar as the ones in the States
So I'm looking forward to it
Look at these French fries...

(Piles...) There's so many!
This is a double order, and this is a single order
(This is it...) It's the perfect French fries I wanted
(That's a very nice reaction...)
It's perfectly salty
You know French fries taste better when saltier, right?
While it's salty,
the potatoes
are very soft and fluffy
(Burgers hiding their identity...) I don't know which one's which!
Since I like the number 3,
I'll go with Lucky 3!
(Opens)
It looks so delicious
As you can see,
(Bacon Burger) it has bacon, onion, and lettuce

The difference between
the little and regular burgers
is the difference between having 1 or 2 patties
The little burgers have 1, regular burgers have 2
Let's dig in
The smoked smell is amazing
(The patty fills the entire mouth...!)
The meat tastes so savory
And the buns...
It's very moist and soft
I don't like veggies,
so I didn't add that many toppings
But it's not like the toppings cost anything
Even if you add all the toppings,
there is no extra cost
So if you say, 'All the way,'

that means to add all toppings
(You can also choose 'All the way' in Korea)
I added grilled onions
The onions are nicely grilled
so it has a nice scent
There are two types of potatoes
Would you like some milkshakes?
Oh!
Ah, thank you!
(Cup 1: Chocolate Peanut Butter)
(+Salty Caramel)
(Cup 2: Salty Caramel)
(+Banana)
(Gentle) Thank you haha
I taste some kind of biscuits inside
(Go for the recommendation if you don't know what to order) Wow, this customized drink is so delicious!

This is banana and salty caramel
The banana flavor is really strong
This is a really good place for shakes
I didn't realize it earlier, but..
the guy who just gave me this
is the Vice President of Marketing
of Five Guys in Europe... He's quite famous...
(The sweetest shake marketing...) Someone very high up gave me this
It's not a typical franchise burger
It's absolutely like a homemade burger!
These are Cajun fries, and these are regular fries
I personally like the regular fries
So delicious!
(Can't stop munching on French fries)
With the burger and topping combinations,
you can make 250,000 different burgers

There are a thousand combinations of shakes
Next up is...
(Turns respectful)
(Now the VP of Marketing looks like he's shining)
(If you don't know English, just raise your thumbs...!)
(Can't speak English...) I get nervous with English
Number 1...
is the regular hamburger
The regular hamburger!
I added a lot of toppings to this one
So it got this thick
(Hamburger) This one has BBQ sauce in it
(Extra toppings!) Tomato slice and grilled mushrooms!
The combination of mayo and BBQ sauce is crazy...!
I love how you can customize the burger
(Veggies that were always abandoned) because I usually eat without pickles

and I don't eat a lot of lettuce
It's so nice that we can customize the burger
The first hamburger I ate earlier
and this second hamburger
taste completely different
(Thumbs up)
Yes? Great!
(I can't resist the fries either!!)
At the briefing we had downstairs,
I've heard that
they give you...
a huge amount of food
It's true, it's a lot of food
Look at the French fries
It's amazing
(This is it)

These potatoes...
Actually, it's meant to be different here
because they use the calibration method
They inspect the potatoes every morning,
so they're bound to be delicious!
This time...
let's try the plain cheeseburger
(Cheeseburger) I didn't add any toppings
It's...
pure!
Delicious!
The one with toppings taste delicious
but the plain one is also great!
The cheese flavor is so strong!
Wow, it's so gooey
It's like...

if you want to have a really thick burger
(A collab of rich and dense flavors...!) with a condensed beef flavor,
this is a really good way to do it
(Burger 4?)
(Wow)
(Both their burgers and reactions are amazing)
Wow!
(Shining)
(Bacon Cheese Hot Dog) The sausage is split in half like this
There's bacon, lettuce, and cheese
I'm at a pre-opening launch event today,
so in a little bit,
they'll be opening a small event
We're going to have a raffle
and my number is 25
The director's number 26

(The producer's gift is also mine) Let's look forward to it
This hot dog is also so delicious!
American sausages are the best!
Wow, they have amazing shakes here
(Because it's an event...) There is a time limit...
So I'm eating as fast as possible
If I can't eat these in time,
I'll take it and enjoy it at home
The bacon inside
isn't soft bacon
It's like the American-style
crispy bacon
Next up is...
I'm going to try something new, like the sandwich
What's this?
(Tzuyang looks surprised...) What is this?

(Grilled cheese sandwich with an unfamiliar look)
I ordered a cheese sandwich
without any toppings
(It's the correct menu item) It's a sandwich
If you add some lettuce,
(It looks different, but it's the same old sandwich) grilled onions...
or mushroom and such, and it's a sandwich
The cool thing is...
I thought they used sandwich bread,
but the bread
(The secret was the flipped buns) is actually flipped burger buns! See that?
(Korean reaction out of shock) Aeee-yahh
(Bow of acknowledgment in Korean style...)
Next!
(Bacon Cheeseburger)
It's burger 6?!

(This is what Korean mukbangs are like...?)
Delicious...!
(Even if you don't know Korean, just raise your thumbs...!)
(You get it?)
(Thumbs up is the universal language lol)
I think the tomatoes and mayo are the icing on top
And the grilled mushrooms!
(Unfortunately, I only added toppings to the hamburger...) I should have added all of these...
I want to add them...
I didn't know... You should definitely add the toppings!
Oh, so...
I'm pretty sure the 'All the Way'
can't go wrong
Since it's packed with ingredients
I've always found that
the more toppings, the better

(Boom boom boom boom)
Let's begin!
(Raffle time) The draw is on, draw, draw!
(The raffle event had a variety of prizes) You've drawn the red capsule, shall we open it?
Number 39!
Number 39!
(She is clearly disappointed...)
(It's too early to be disappointed...!) And then one more person
(Number 25... 25... 2... 5...) And the second winner is!
(No Way) It's number 63!
There are a lot of numbers!
I thought it was up to about 50
Number 43!
(Gave up on her dreams and hopes) Number 43!
(Let's just eat...)
(The prizes are getting farther away from her...) Number 18!

- Number 44!! - 44!
27!!
(So close)
(Number 25 is crying here) So sad...
Number 27?
Thank you!!
Goodbye!!
Can I stay here and eat?
Finish in 5 minutes?
Okay...
(The event is ending and I need to leave...) I have to leave now
So let me pack this up
It's all very delicious
(Try the flavors of the United States at 'Five Guys') It's like I'm eating burgers at Manhattan...
Seriously
I'm going to eat this

and pack up the rest
to enjoy at home
(It's the country's treasure...!) Seriously, these fries are the best!
(You're still here?)
(Timeout) I should get going
(Let's go home) Let's pack it up and leave
(Alas, I decided to pack it up...)
I'm down to the Little Bacon Cheeseburger
and the Beef Hot Dog
I'll save these for when I get home
Thanks for a great meal today!
(The VP followed me on Instagram!)
(Thanks for the invite!)
